# landisutils

Tools and utilities for preparing data for and running LANDIS-II
simulations, and post-processing their outputs.

1.  prepare data in R and convert to LANDIS-II-compatible formats;
2.  programmatically create and write LANDIS-II extension input files;
3.  programmatically create and write LANDIS-II scenario and other
    simulation files;
4.  extraction of data from output logs;
5.  other post-processing tools;

> \[!NOTE\] **This package is a work in progress.** Testing, feedback
> and help are greatly appreciated!

The following LANDIS-II extensions are currently supported:

| **LANDIS-II Succession Extension** | **`landisutils` class** |
|------------------------------------|-------------------------|
| Biomass Succession                 | `BiomassSuccession`     |
| Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS)   | `ForCS`                 |
| NECN Succession                    | *coming soon*           |
| PnET Succession                    | *coming soon*           |
| DGS Succession                     | *coming soon*           |

| **LANDIS-II Disturbance Extension**   | **`landisutils` class** |
|---------------------------------------|-------------------------|
| Original Fire                         | `OriginalFire`          |
| Dynamic Biomass Fuels                 | `DynamicFuels`          |
| Dynamic Fire System                   | `DynamicFire`           |
| Social-Climate-Fire                   | `SocialClimateFire`     |
|                                       |                         |
| Linear Wind                           | *coming soon*           |
| Original Wind                         | *coming soon*           |
|                                       |                         |
| Climate Biological Disturbance Agents | *coming soon*           |
| Epidemiological Disturbance Agents    | *coming soon*           |
| Hurricanes                            | *coming soon*           |
| Land Use Plus                         | *coming soon*           |
| DGS Succession                        | *coming soon*           |

| **LANDIS-II Other Extension**    | **`landisutils` class** |
|----------------------------------|-------------------------|
| Biomass Output                   | `OutputBiomass`         |
| Biomass-by-Age Output            | `OutputBiomassByAge`    |
| Biomass Reclassification Output  | *coming soon*           |
| Cohort Statistics Output         | `OutputCohortStats`     |
| Landscape Habitat Output         | *coming soon*           |
| Local Habitat Suitability Output | *coming soon*           |
| Maximum Species Age Output       | `OutputMaxSpeciesAge`   |
| PnET Output                      | *coming soon*           |

## Installation

You can install the development version of `landisutils` like so:

``` r
remotes::install_github("FOR-CAST/landisutils")
```

## Preparing data

Use `prep*()` functions to convert input data to LANDIS-II data formats
or auxiliary config files.

``` r
## e.g., to prepare the initial communities .csv and raster files
init_comm_files <- prepInitialCommunities(cohortData, pixelGroupMap, tmp_pth)
```

## Creating LANDIS-II input files

For any of the supported extensions, use `new()` method to create an
object which can be used to produce configuration files. The
configuration can be defined all at once, or built up in sequence, or
modified to produce alternate configurations. If producing several
configurations, be sure to update the `path` for each configuration to
ensure they will not be overwritten.

``` r
## e.g., to prepare Biomass Succession inputs
ext_biomass_succession <- BiomassSuccession$new(
  path = tmp_pth,
  Timestep = 10,
  SeedingAlgorithm = "WardSeedDispersal",
  InitialCommunitiesFiles = init_comm_files,
  ClimateConfigFile = clim_file,
  CalibrateMode = NULL, ## optional
  SpinupCohorts = FALSE, ## optional; v7.1
  SpinupMortalityFraction = 0.05, ## v7.1
  MinRelativeBiomass = min_rel_b,
  SufficientLight = suff_light,
  SpeciesDataFile = spp_file,
  EcoregionParameters = erp_df,
  SpeciesEcoregionDataFile = spperd_file,
  FireReductionParameters = frp_df,
  HarvestReductionParameters = hrp_df
)
```

Once your configuration is ready to write to disk for use with
LANDIS-II:

``` r
## show files associated with this configuration
ext_biomass_succession$files

## write the main extension configuration / input file
ext_biomass_succession$write()
```

### Manual file creation (advanced use)

Use `insert*()` functions when generating LANDIS-II input text files
manually.

``` r
insertInitialCommunities(init_comm_files)
```

## Creating LANDIS-II scenario files

Use
[`scenario()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/scenario.md)
to construct scenario files:

``` r
## other extensions can be added to be run once created per above
scenario(
  cell_length = 250,
  duration = 200,
  extensions = list(
    succession = list(ext_biomass_succession),
    disturbance = list(),
    other = list()
  ),
  name = "my_scenario_a",
  path = file.path("path", "to", "project")
)
```

## Working with simulation outputs

*Coming soon!*

# Package index

## All functions

- [`BiomassSuccession`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/BiomassSuccession.md)
  : Biomass Succession Extension

- [`DynamicFire`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/DynamicFire.md)
  : Dynamic Fire System Extension

- [`DynamicFuels`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/DynamicFuels.md)
  : Dynamic Fuel System Extension

- [`ForCS`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/ForCS.md) :
  Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS) Extension

- [`LandisClimateConfig`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/LandisClimateConfig.md)
  :

  `LandisClimateConfig` class

- [`LandisExtension`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/LandisExtension.md)
  :

  `LandisExtension` class

- [`LandisScenario`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/LandisScenario.md)
  :

  `LandisScenario` class

- [`MapNames()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/MapNames.md)
  : Create Map Names pattern for file outputs

- [`OriginalFire`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/OriginalFire.md)
  : Original Fire Extension

- [`OutputBiomass`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/OutputBiomass.md)
  : Biomass Output Extension

- [`OutputBiomassByAge`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/OutputBiomassByAge.md)
  : Biomass Output by Age Extension

- [`OutputCohortStats`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/OutputCohortStats.md)
  : Cohort Statistics Extension

- [`OutputMaxSpeciesAge`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/OutputMaxSpeciesAge.md)
  : Max Species Age Extension

- [`SocialClimateFire`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/SocialClimateFire.md)
  : Social-Climate-Fire Extension

- [`appendPercent()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/appendPercent.md)
  : Ensure percent symbol appended to table values

- [`calibrate_original_fire()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/calibrate_original_fire.md)
  : Calibrate Original Fire

- [`defaultFireDamageTable()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/defaultFireDamageTable.md)
  : Create sample Fire Damage Table

- [`defaultFuelCurveTable()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/defaultFuelCurveTable.md)
  : Create sample Fuel Curve Table

- [`defaultFuelTypeTable()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/defaultFuelTypeTable.md)
  : Create sample Fuel Type Table

- [`insertANPPTimeSeries()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertANPPTimeSeries.md)
  :

  Specify `ANPPTimeSeries` for Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS)
  extension

- [`insertAvailableLightBiomass()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertAvailableLightBiomass.md)
  :

  Specify `AvailableLightBiomass` for Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS)
  extension

- [`insertBuildUpIndex()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertBuildUpIndex.md)
  :

  Specify Dynamic Fire Extension `BuildUpIndex`

- [`insertClimateConfigFile()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertClimateConfigFile.md)
  :

  Specify `ClimateConfigFile`

- [`insertDOMPools()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertDOMPools.md)
  :

  Specify `DOMPools` for Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS) extension

- [`insertDisturbanceConversionTable()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertDisturbanceConversionTable.md)
  : Specify Dynamic Fuel Extension's Disturbance Conversion Table

- [`insertEcoSppDOMParameters()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertEcoSppDOMParameters.md)
  :

  Specify `EcoSppDOMParameters` for Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS)
  extension

- [`insertEcoregionParameters()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertEcoregionParameters.md)
  :

  Specify `EcoregionParameters` table

- [`insertEcoregionTable()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertEcoregionTable.md)
  : Specify Dynamic Fuel Extension's Ecoregion Table

- [`insertEcoregionsFiles()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertEcoregionsFiles.md)
  :

  Specify `Ecoregions` and `EcoregionsMap` Files

- [`insertEstablishProbabilities()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertEstablishProbabilities.md)
  :

  Specify `EstablishProbabilities` for Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS)
  extension

- [`insertSuccessionExtensions()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertExtensions.md)
  [`insertDisturbanceExtensions()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertExtensions.md)
  [`insertOtherExtensions()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertExtensions.md)
  : Specify Scenario Extensions Tables

- [`insertFireReductionParameters()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertFireReductionParameters.md)
  :

  Specify Biomass Succession Extension `FireReductionParameters` Table

- [`insertFireRegionParametersTable()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertFireRegionParametersTable.md)
  : Specify Fire Region Parameters Table

- [`insertFireSizesTable()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertFireSizesTable.md)
  : Specify Fire Size Table

- [`insertForCSProportions()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertForCSProportions.md)
  :

  Specify `ForCSProportions` for Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS)
  extension

- [`insertFuelCurveTable()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertFuelCurveTable.md)
  :

  Specify Original Fire `FuelCurveTable`

- [`insertFuelTypeTable()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertFuelTypeTable.md)
  :

  Specify Dynamic Fire Extension `FuelTypeTable`

- [`insertFuelTypesTable()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertFuelTypesTable.md)
  : Specify Dynamic Fuel Extension's Fuel Types Table

- [`insertGroundSlopeFile()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertGroundSlopeFile.md)
  :

  Specify Dynamic Fire Extension `GroundSlopeFile`

- [`insertHarvestReductionParameters()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertHarvestReductionParameters.md)
  :

  Specify Biomass Succession Extension `HarvestReductionParameters`
  Table

- [`insertInitialCommunities()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertInitialCommunities.md)
  :

  Specify `InitialCommunities` and `InitialCommunitiesMap` Files

- [`insertLightEstablishmentTable()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertLightEstablishmentTable.md)
  :

  Specify `LightEstablishmentTable` for Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS)
  extension

- [`insertMaxBiomassTimeSeries()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertMaxBiomassTimeSeries.md)
  :

  Specify `MaxBiomassTimeSeries` for Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS)
  extension

- [`insertMinRelativeBiomass()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertMinRelativeBiomass.md)
  :

  Specify Biomass Succession Extension `MinRelativeBiomass` Table

- [`insertOutputTables()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertOutputTables.md)
  :

  Specify `OutputTables` for Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS) extension

  Specify Scenario `RandomNumberSeed`

  Specify `RootDynamics` for Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS) extension

  : Specify Dynamic Fire Extension's Season Table

- [`insertSoilSpinupControls()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertSoilSpinupControls.md)
  :

  Specify `SoilSpinup` for Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS) extension

- [`insertSpeciesDataFile()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertSpeciesDataFile.md)
  : Specify Species Data File

- [`insertSpeciesEcoregionDataFile()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertSpeciesEcoregionDataFile.md)
  :

  Specify `SpeciesEcoregionData` File

- [`insertSpeciesFuelCoefficients()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertSpeciesFuelCoefficients.md)
  : Specify Dynamic Fuel Extension's Species Fuel Coefficients

- [`insertSpeciesParameters()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertSpeciesParameters.md)
  :

  Specify `SpeciesParameters` for Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS)
  extension

- [`insertSufficientLight()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertSufficientLight.md)
  :

  Specify Biomass Succession Extension `SufficientLight` Table

- [`insertUphillSlopeAzimuthMap()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertUphillSlopeAzimuthMap.md)
  :

  Specify Dynamic Fire Extension `UphillSlopeAzimuthMap`

- [`insertWindCurveTable()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/insertWindCurveTable.md)
  :

  Specify Original Fire `WindCurveTable`

- [`landis_find()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/landis_find.md)
  : Find an installed version of LANDIS-II

- [`landis_process()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/landis_run.md)
  [`landis_run()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/landis_run.md)
  : Run a LANDIS-II simulation from the R session

- [`prepClimateConfig()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/prepClimateConfig.md)
  :

  Create `ClimateConfigFile`

- [`prepClimateFile()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/prepClimateFile.md)
  :

  Prepare `ClimateFile` for Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS) extension

- [`prepDisturbanceConversionTable()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/prepDisturbanceConversionTable.md)
  : Create Dynamic Fire Extension's Disturbance Conversion Table

- [`prepDisturbanceMatrixFile()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/prepDisturbanceMatrixFile.md)
  :

  Prepare `DisturbanceMatrixFile` for Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS)
  extension

- [`prepDynamicEcoregionTable()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/prepDynamicEcoregionTable.md)
  :

  Prepare Dynamic Fire Extension `DynamicEcoregionTable`

- [`prepDynamicWeatherTable()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/prepDynamicWeatherTable.md)
  :

  Prepare Dynamic Fire Extension `DynamicWeatherTable`

- [`prepEcoregionParameters()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/prepEcoregionParameters.md)
  : Create Ecoregion Parameters Table

- [`prepEcoregionsFiles()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/prepEcoregionsFiles.md)
  :

  Create `Ecoregions` and `EcoregionsMap` Files

- [`prepFireReductionParameters()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/prepFireReductionParameters.md)
  :

  Prepare Biomass Succession Extension `FireReductionParameters` Table

- [`prepFireRegionParametersTable()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/prepFireRegionParametersTable.md)
  :

  Prepare Original Fire Extension `FireRegionParameters` Table

- [`prepFireSizesTable()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/prepFireSizesTable.md)
  :

  Prepare Dynamic Fire Extension `FireSizes` Table

- [`prepFuelTypesTable()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/prepFuelTypesTable.md)
  : Create Dynamic Fire Extension's Fuel Types Table

- [`prepHarvestReductionParameters()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/prepHarvestReductionParameters.md)
  :

  Prepare Biomass Succession Extension `HarvestReductionParameters`
  Table

- [`prepInitialCommunities()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/prepInitialCommunities.md)
  :

  Create `InitialCommunities` and `InitialCommunitiesMap` Files

- [`prepInitialFireRegionsMap()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/prepInitialFireRegionsMap.md)
  :

  Create Original Fire `InitialFireRegionsMap`

- [`prepInitialWeatherDatabase()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/prepInitialWeatherDatabase.md)
  : Create Dynamic Fire Extension's Initial Weather Database

- [`prepMinRelativeBiomass()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/prepMinRelativeBiomass.md)
  :

  Prepare Biomass Succession Extension `MinRelativeBiomass` Table

- [`prepSnagFile()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/prepSnagFile.md)
  :

  Prepare `SnagFile` for Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS) extension

- [`prepSpeciesData()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/prepSpeciesData.md)
  : Species Data File

- [`prepSpeciesEcoregionDataFile()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/prepSpeciesEcoregionDataFile.md)
  : Create Species Ecoregion Data File

- [`prepSuppression_CSV_File()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/prepSuppression_CSV_File.md)
  :

  Prepare `Suppression_CSV_File` for Social-Climate-Fire extension

- [`prepGroundSlopeFile()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/prepTopographyFiles.md)
  [`prepUphillAzimuthMap()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/prepTopographyFiles.md)
  : Prepare Ground Slope and Uphill Azimuth raster files

- [`prep_daily_weather()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/prep_climate_data.md)
  [`prep_monthly_weather()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/prep_climate_data.md)
  : Prepare Climate Data

- [`proj_daymet`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/proj_climate_data.md)
  : PROJ4 strings for climate data

- [`proj_nrcan_lcc`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/proj_forest_data.md)
  : PROJ4 strings for forest data

- [`scenario()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/scenario.md)
  : Create LANDIS-II scenario files

- [`simplifyCohorts()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/simplifyCohorts.md)
  : Simplify cohorts

- [`writeClimateData()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/writeClimateData.md)
  : Write LANDIS-II Climate Input File to disk

- [`yesno()`](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/reference/yesno.md)
  : Convert logical to "yes" or "no"

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [Preparing Biomass Succession
  Inputs](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/articles/Biomass-Succession.md):
- [Preparing Climate Data for Use With
  LANDIS-II](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/articles/climate-data.md):
- [Preparing Dynamic Fire and Fuels
  Inputs](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/articles/Dynamic-Fire-Fuels.md):
- [Preparing Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS)
  Inputs](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/articles/Forest-Carbon-Succession.md):
- [Preparing Social-Climate-Fire
  Inputs](https://for-cast.github.io/landisutils/articles/Social-Climate-Fire.md):
